---
title: "final_project_xy"
author: "Xiyuan ZHAO"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

## Research Question

This report examines how adolescent vaccination coverage varies across vaccine types.

## Summary Table

```{r}
summary_table <- readRDS("output/summary_table.rds")
kable(summary_table, digits = 2)
```

## Figure

```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width="80%"}
knitr::include_graphics("output/vaccination_plot.png")
```

## Conclusion

Vaccination coverage varies across vaccine types, suggesting differences in uptake across recommended adolescent vaccines.
